text:
Satya Keerthi Dara 
satyakeerthidara7@gmail.com | 940-277-9720 | LinkedIn 
 
SUMMARY 
• Built data-driven systems using Python and SQL to analyze datasets and support business decision-making   
• Experienced in developing data pipelines, performing data analysis, and ensuring data quality and integrity   
• Developed reporting solutions and dashboards to track KPIs and communicate insights to stakeholders   
• Strong in problem-solving, data modeling, and improving workflows through data-driven solutions   
 
SKILLS 
Programming: Python, SQL   
Data: Data Analysis, ETL, Data Cleaning, Data Validation   
Tools: Excel, Git, Linux   
Visualization: Visualization: Power BI, Excel Dashboards, Data Reporting 
Concepts: Data Modeling, Data Warehousing, KPIs, Reporting, Data Quality   
 
WORK EXPERIENCE 
Software Engineer 
SAK Informatics                 Feb 2022 – Nov 2023 
Technologies: Python, SQL, FastAPI, HTML, CSS, APIs 
• Built a Data Processing & Reporting System to analyze document-based datasets and generate insights   
• Designed SQL-based pipelines to process and transform structured and unstructured data   
• Performed data analysis to identify trends and track key performance indicators (KPIs)   
• Developed APIs to support data retrieval and reporting processes   
• Ensured data accuracy through validation and data quality checks   
• Collaborated with stakeholders to deliver insights and support reporting requirements 
 
Software Engineer 
Cisco                    Aug 2021 – Dec 2021 
Technologies: Python, SQL, APIs, Linux 
• Built a Network Data Analysis System to process and analyze large-scale datasets   
• Designed data pipelines to transform and prepare data for reporting   
• Performed analysis to identify patterns, trends, and performance issues   
• Automated data processing and reporting tasks using Python   
• Validated data accuracy and ensured reliable outputs   
• Collaborated with stakeholders to provide insights and support reporting needs   
 
EDUCATION

Southeast Missouri State University – Cape Girardeau, Missouri 
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science           Aug 2018 – May 2022 
Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University – Hyderabad, India

Data Analytics Dashboard & Reporting System

Data Pipeline & Insight Generation System
